concerns.text: Task T035 'Code cleanup and refactoring (PEP8 compliance, remove dead code) (`code/`)' is overly coarse. It bundles several distinct activities (running black, flake8, dead‑code removal) without specifying concrete verification steps. Split into finer‑grained tasks (e.g., T035a run black on `code/`, T035b run flake8, T035c remove dead code) and state how each will be verified.

Task T007 'Create a top‑level `src/` alias (symlink) if needed for imports (`src/__init__.py`)' is ambiguous about when it is required and adds unnecessary complexity to the project layout. Clarify the condition under which the symlink is needed or remove the task to avoid confusion.
